---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<section style="padding: 5rem 4rem; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;">

  <p class="section-label">About</p>
  <h2 class="section-title" style="margin-bottom: 2rem;">Name</h2>

  <p style="font-size: 0.88rem; color: rgba(61,38,69,0.6); line-height: 1.9; margin-bottom: 3rem; max-width: 560px;">
    By day I'm a senior bioinformatics scientist wrangling genomic data. By night I'm plotting which GBBO baker peaked too early or how much screen time your favorite Housewife actually gets. The Plots Thicken is my little corner of the internet where data viz meets everyday drama — equal parts R code and reality TV receipts.
  </p>

  <p class="section-label">Tools & Skills</p>

  <div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.6rem; margin-top: 1rem;">
    <span style="font-size: 0.78rem; padding: 0.35rem 0.9rem; border: 1px solid rgba(194,80,122,0.3); border-radius: 999px; color: #3d2645;">R</span>
    <span style="font-size: 0.78rem; padding: 0.35rem 0.9rem; border: 1px solid rgba(194,80,122,0.3); border-radius: 999px; color: #3d2645;">ggplot2</span>
    <span style="font-size: 0.78rem; padding: 0.35rem 0.9rem; border: 1px solid rgba(194,80,122,0.3); border-radius: 999px; color: #3d2645;">Python</span>
    <span style="font-size: 0.78rem; padding: 0.35rem 0.9rem; border: 1px solid rgba(194,80,122,0.3); border-radius: 999px; color: #3d2645;">Quarto</span>
    <span style="font-size: 0.78rem; padding: 0.35rem 0.9rem; border: 1px solid rgba(194,80,122,0.3); border-radius: 999px; color: #3d2645;">tidyverse</span>
    <span style="font-size: 0.78rem; padding: 0.35rem 0.9rem; border: 1px solid rgba(194,80,122,0.3); border-radius: 999px; color: #3d2645;">Canva</span>
    <span style="font-size: 0.78rem; padding: 0.35rem 0.9rem; border: 1px solid rgba(194,80,122,0.3); border-radius: 999px; color: #3d2645;">Adobe Illustrator</span>
    <span style="font-size: 0.78rem; padding: 0.35rem 0.9rem; border: 1px solid rgba(194,80,122,0.25); border-radius: 999px; color: rgba(61,38,69,0.5); font-style: italic;">Tableau ✦ learning</span>
  </div>

</section>
```
